name: SUB: Social Media Upload — Dynamic Multi-Account

parameters.content:
## Social Media Upload Sub-Workflow

**Input payload from parent workflow:**
```
{
  source: 'clickup' | 'sheet',
  source_id: '<task_id or row_id>',
  accounts: ['arya instagram', 'arya youtube', 'arya linkedin'],
  reel_url: '<google drive share url>',
  cover_url: '<google drive share url>',
  caption: '<pre-written or empty string>',
  title: '<video title>'
}
```

Platforms: Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn Video
Credentials: Named in n8n exactly as account name
AI Caption: Auto-generated if caption field is empty
Status writeback: Updates ClickUp task or Google Sheet row

## Setup Checklist

**Step 1 — n8n Credentials**
Create credentials named exactly like your accounts:
- Facebook Graph API → `arya instagram` (one per IG account)
- YouTube OAuth2 → `arya youtube`
- LinkedIn OAuth2 → `arya linkedin`

**Step 2 — Replace placeholder IDs in nodes**
- YOUR_OPENAI_CRED_ID
- YOUR_FB_CRED_ID
- YOUR_YT_CRED_ID
- YOUR_LI_CRED_ID
- YOUR_CLICKUP_CRED_ID
- YOUR_GSHEET_CRED_ID
- YOUR_SHEET_ID

**Step 3 — Instagram IG Business Account ID**
In 'IG: Create Reel Container' node, the `node` field needs your real IG Business Account numeric ID (not the account name). You can get it from Graph API /me/accounts.

**Step 4 — Google Sheet columns needed**
Status | Posted At | Post ID | Platform | Account | Error

**Step 5 — Parent workflow payload**
```
{
  source: 'clickup',
  source_id: 'abc123',
  accounts: ['arya instagram', 'arya youtube'],
  reel_url: 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view',
  cover_url: 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view',
  caption: '',
  title: 'My Video'
}
```

## Social Media Upload Sub-Workflow

**Input payload from parent workflow:**
```
{
  source: 'clickup' | 'sheet',
  source_id: '<task_id or row_id>',
  accounts: ['arya instagram', 'arya youtube', 'arya linkedin'],
  reel_url: '<google drive share url>',
  cover_url: '<google drive share url>',
  caption: '<pre-written or empty string>',
  title: '<video title>'
}
```

Platforms: Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn Video
Credentials: Named in n8n exactly as account name
AI Caption: Auto-generated if caption field is empty
Status writeback: Updates ClickUp task or Google Sheet row

values.content: You are an expert social media copywriter. Write punchy engaging captions for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and LinkedIn video posts. End with 5-8 relevant hashtags.

parameters.content:
## Setup Checklist

**Step 1 — n8n Credentials (name them exactly like account names)**
- Facebook Graph API  →  `arya instagram`
- YouTube OAuth2      →  `arya youtube`
- LinkedIn OAuth2     →  `arya linkedin`

**Step 2 — Replace placeholder IDs in nodes**
- YOUR_OPENAI_CRED_ID
- YOUR_FB_CRED_ID
- YOUR_YT_CRED_ID
- YOUR_LI_CRED_ID
- YOUR_CLICKUP_CRED_ID
- YOUR_GSHEET_CRED_ID
- YOUR_SHEET_ID

**Step 3 — Instagram**
Replace the `node` field value in IG nodes with your actual IG Business Account numeric ID.

**Step 4 — Google Sheet columns needed**
Status | Posted At | Post ID | Platform | Account | Error

**Step 5 — Parent workflow mock payload**
```json
{
  "source": "clickup",
  "source_id": "task_abc123",
  "accounts": ["arya instagram", "arya youtube"],
  "reel_url": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view",
  "cover_url": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view",
  "caption": "",
  "title": "My Video"
}
```

## Account Registry Sheet

Sheet name: `AccountRegistry`

| account_name | platform | ig_user_id | access_token | credential_name | active |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| arya instagram | instagram | 17841474119999455 | EAABsbCS... | arya fb graph | true |
| arya youtube | youtube | | ya29.a0... | arya youtube | true |
| arya linkedin | linkedin | | AQX... | arya linkedin | true |
| brand instagram | instagram | 17841477123456789 | EAABsbCS... | brand fb graph | true |

**Adding a new account = just add a row. No n8n changes needed.**
**Rotating a token = update 1 cell.**
**Disabling an account = set active = false.**

## Instagram
`ig_user_id` and `access_token` are resolved
dynamically from the Account Registry sheet.

No hardcoded IDs. Adding a new IG account
= add 1 row to the registry sheet.

## Social Media Upload Sub-Workflow

**Input payload from parent workflow:**

  source: 'clickup' | 'sheet',
  source_id: '<task_id or row_id>',

nodes.name: YT: Upload Short
nodes.notes: Credential must be named exactly as credential_name in registry. For 100% dynamic token use, replace with HTTP Request node using access_token from registry.
